name: 3-amino-5-phenylpentane
description: 3-amino-5-phenylpentane is a solid. This compound belongs to the phenylpropylamines. These are compounds containing a phenylpropylamine moiety, which consists of a phenyl group substituted at the third carbon by a propan-1-amine. 3-amino-5-phenylpentane targets the proteins cathepsin K and cathepsin L2.
